common.name: Name
language.label: Language
dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Manage your people and properties from the panel below.
people.title: People
people.subtitle: Manage registered people
people.empty_description: Start by registering a new person.
people.search_placeholder: Search by name, CPF or email...
people.fields.name: Full Name
people.placeholders.name: Enter full name
people.delete_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete this person? This action cannot be undone.
people.has_properties: This person cannot be deleted because they have properties associated. Remove the properties first.
properties.title: Properties
properties.subtitle: Manage registered properties
properties.empty_description: Start by registering a new property.
properties.search_placeholder: Search by street, number or neighborhood...
properties.delete_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete this property? This action cannot be undone.
validation.invalid_cpf: The CPF provided is not valid.
validation.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.date_future: The birth date cannot be a future date.
validation.owner_not_found: The selected owner does not belong to your account.
errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action.
errors.server: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
profile.title: Profile
profile.information.title: Profile Information
profile.information.description: Update your account's profile information and email address.
profile.information.resend_verification: Click here to re-send the verification email.
profile.information.verification_sent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.
profile.password.title: Update Password
profile.password.description: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure.
profile.two_factor.title: Two Factor Authentication
profile.two_factor.description: Add additional security to your account using two factor authentication.
profile.two_factor.enabled: You have enabled two factor authentication.
profile.two_factor.not_enabled: You have not enabled two factor authentication.
profile.two_factor.prompt_info: When two factor authentication is enabled, you will be prompted for a secure, random token during authentication. You may retrieve this token from your phone's Google Authenticator application.
profile.two_factor.scan_to_finish: To finish enabling two factor authentication, scan the following QR code using your phone's authenticator application or enter the setup key and provide the generated OTP code.
profile.two_factor.scan_enabled: Two factor authentication is now enabled. Scan the following QR code using your phone's authenticator application or enter the setup key.
profile.two_factor.recovery_codes_info: Store these recovery codes in a secure password manager. They can be used to recover access to your account if your two factor authentication device is lost.
profile.sessions.title: Browser Sessions
profile.sessions.description: Manage and log out your active sessions on other browsers and devices.
profile.sessions.info: If necessary, you may log out of all of your other browser sessions across all of your devices. Some of your recent sessions are listed below; however, this list may not be exhaustive. If you feel your account has been compromised, you should also update your password.
profile.sessions.modal_content: Please enter your password to confirm you would like to log out of your other browser sessions across all of your devices.
profile.delete.title: Delete Account
profile.delete.info: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will be permanently deleted. Before deleting your account, please download any data or information that you wish to retain.
profile.delete.confirm_question: Are you sure you want to delete your account? Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.
profile.confirm_password.title: Confirm Password
profile.confirm_password.content: For your security, please confirm your password to continue.
